name: HACKETT GROUP, INC.
summary: The Hackett Group, Inc. (HCKT) is a business consulting and information technology firm providing consulting services and solutions. The company has capabilities in generative AI-related consulting services and solutions, and has made acquisitions including LeewayHertz and Spend Matters. It operates joint ventures and serves clients across business consulting and IT industries.
